headline: Jensen Huang Just Made a $1 Trillion Prediction. One Stock Benefits Most, and It’s Not Nvidia
summary: Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang made a $1 trillion forecast this March during the company’s GTC 2026 conference. During his keynote, Huang projected that cumulative demand for Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin chip architectures would reach “at least $1 trillion” through the end of 2027. headline: TSM vs. AVGO: Which is a Better Semiconductor Stock?
summary: Chip maker Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) reported its Q4 2025 results in January, while Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) filed its Q1 FY2026 results in March. Both are riding the same AI wave from structurally different positions: one builds fabs, the other designs chips and sells software. headline: Meta Takes a Swipe at Tesla With $9 Trillion Stock Goal in Half the Time
summary: Meta Platforms  has unveiled ambitious executive pay incentives, targeting a $9 trillion market capitalization by 2031 as it looks to get ahead in the intensifying AI talent race.  Under the stock options program, which includes six leaders but not CEO Mark Zuckerberg, the full value of the options would only be realized if Meta stock jumps more than 500% to $3,727, according to filings late Tuesday.  Meta stock rose 1.2% early Wednesday.
